channel.title: GitHub HCL Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of HCL in GitHub

item.description: Terraform module to create AWS ECS resources 🇺🇦

item.description: Code and configuration to manage Kubernetes project infrastructure, including various *.k8s.io sites

item.description: Random code for HashiCorp related projects, training, etc.

item.description: Master Terraform in 7 days using this Zero to Hero course.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-alb
item.description: Terraform module to create AWS Application/Network Load Balancer (ALB/NLB) resources 🇺🇦

item.description: Terraform module to create AWS Security Group resources 🇺🇦

item.description: Optimized and Maintenance-free Kubernetes on Hetzner Cloud in one command!

item.title: terraform-google-modules/terraform-google-cloud-storage
item.description: Creates one or more Cloud Storage buckets and assigns basic permissions on them to arbitrary users

item.title: cloudposse/terraform-aws-s3-bucket
item.description: Terraform module that creates an S3 bucket with an optional IAM user for external CI/CD systems

item.description: Terraform module to create AWS RDS resources 🇺🇦

item.description: Configures opinionated GKE clusters

item.description: Terraform module to create AWS EC2 instance(s) resources 🇺🇦

item.description: Terraform module which provisions addons on Amazon EKS clusters

item.description: Terraform Module to define a consistent naming convention by (namespace, stage, name, [attributes])

item.title: eth-clients/goerli
item.description: the goerli/prater testnet configurations.

item.title: terraform-aws-modules/terraform-aws-lambda
item.description: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦

item.title: LondheShubham153/TerraWeek
item.description: #TerraWeek Challenge by TWS Community Builders is a 7 Day challenge to Upskill the DevOps Community, which will be starting on 5th June and ending on 11th June at 11:59 P.M IST.
